title: Rename device - the app in/out the background
scenario: Device name does not persist after renaming in Device Settings when app is backgrounded and foregrounded on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name to enter Device Settings.
Tap on the device name field and rename the device (e.g., change to "My Poly Device").
Confirm or save the new name.
Press the Home button or recent apps button to send the app to the background.
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list or home screen.
Navigate back to Device Settings and observe the device name.
expected: The renamed device name (e.g., "My Poly Device") persists and is displayed correctly in Device Settings after bringing the app back to the foreground.
